description: A false-colour composite satellite image showing a diverse coastal and estuarine landscape. The image features a dark blue sea on the left, bordering a light-coloured wavy strip which appears to be vegetated sand dunes or coastal barriers, showing strong red reflectance. A light blue (teal) river or estuary flows from the upper-middle section, curving southwest and emptying into the sea at the bottom-left. Extensive areas of light brown and tan bare land or sparse vegetation are visible across the central and upper-right portions. Several patches of strong red, indicating healthy vegetation or agricultural fields, are scattered throughout, notably in the upper right and adjacent to the river. A distinct, grid-like pattern of square and rectangular evaporation ponds or aquaculture facilities, predominantly dark blue and some whitish-blue, occupies the upper-right quadrant. A dense, reddish-white area representing an urban settlement is situated on the southern bank of the river, near its mouth.
